title: Golden Apple Difference
description: This resource pack will make difference of 2 types of golden apples.
body:
# What does this pack do?
This pack will make difference of golden apple and Enchanted golden apple.
# What this pack useful for?
If you want play game without enchantment glint, you will encount the problem that 2 type of golden apple can't Distinguishable. but with this pack,you can solve that problem!
